👉 [Verify Your Account Details](https://example.com/verify-account)

**Important:** This verification is required to maintain uninterrupted access to your account and to ensure that all communications are sent to the correct email address associated with your account.

If you did not request this verification, please disregard this email. However, if you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to contact our customer support team at [support@examplebank.com](mailto:support@examplebank.com) or call us at 1-800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. We appreciate your cooperation in helping us keep your account secure.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Website] | [Social Media Links] | [Phone Number]

Dear [Customer Name],
